heading: Shopify
content:
[Shopify](https://www.shopify.com/) powers more than 4.4 million businesses across 175+ countries, processing over $235 billion in annual commerce (Shopify, 2023). Iseyon helps businesses build, scale, and manage high-performance eCommerce stores using Shopify. Iseyon's end-to-end solutions are tailored to startups, growing brands, and enterprise merchants, enabling seamless user experiences and secure payment workflows.

Mobile commerce (m-commerce) is expected to reach [$2.4 trillion globally by 2026](https://www.fortunebusinessinsights.com/m-commerce-market-111886), growing at 9.5% annually through 2034 (Fortune Business Insights, 2024). Global [eCommerce now accounts for 20.5% of worldwide retail sales](https://www.shopify.com/enterprise/blog/global-ecommerce-statistics) and is projected to reach 22.5% by 2028 (Shopify, 2025). A 1-second delay in page load time [reduces conversions by 7%](https://www.cloudflare.com/learning/performance/why-site-speed-matters/) (Cloudflare, 2024), making store performance directly tied to revenue outcomes.

> - The future of commerce is vertical, local, and social - merchants who build direct relationships with customers through unified digital storefronts will define the next decade of eCommerce.â€
> - Shopify [Commerce Trends Report](https://www.shopify.com/research/future-of-commerce), 2024

> "Merchants using advanced Shopify analytics and segmentation tools see up to 32% higher conversion rates by personalizing customer journeys with behavioral data."
> - [Shopify Inc.](https://www.shopify.com/analytics), Q4 Merchant Analytics Report, 2024

> "Across Iseyon Analytics' Shopify implementations, clients increase average order value by 18-25% through AI-powered product recommendation engines and customer lifetime value optimization workflows."
> - Iseyon Analytics, [E-Commerce Analytics Benchmark 2024](https://www.iseyon.com/our-team)

## Store Design & Development

### Shopify Store Design & Custom Development

Iseyon designs and develops responsive, conversion-optimized [Shopify](https://www.shopify.com/) stores that align with brand identity. Iseyon builds custom themes and user-friendly storefronts that ensure smooth navigation, fast performance, and engaging shopping experiences across all devices.

### Custom Shopify App Development

Iseyon develops custom [Shopify](https://www.shopify.com/) apps to extend store functionality and automate business processes. From inventory management and vendor workflows to custom checkout logic and third-party integrations, Iseyon delivers solutions that meet unique business requirements.

### Payment Gateway & Checkout Integration

Iseyon integrates secure and scalable payment gateways including [Razorpay](https://razorpay.com/), [Stripe](https://stripe.com/), and [PayPal](https://www.paypal.com/in/home). Iseyon solutions support advanced payment logic such as split payments, multi-vendor payouts, and region-specific compliance, ensuring smooth and reliable checkout experiences.

### Multi-Vendor & Marketplace Solutions

Iseyon helps businesses build and manage multi-vendor marketplaces on [Shopify](https://www.shopify.com/). Iseyon's solutions enable vendor onboarding, product ownership mapping, commission management, order tracking, and automated payouts while maintaining centralized control.

## Automation, Integration & Support

### Shopify Automation & Workflow Optimization

Moreover, Iseyon streamlines store operations with automation for order processing, inventory updates, refunds, cancellations, and vendor settlements. Iseyon solutions reduce manual effort, improve efficiency, and minimize operational errors.

### Shopify Integration Services

Iseyon integrates [Shopify](https://www.shopify.com/) with ERP systems, CRM platforms, analytics tools, and third-party services. Iseyon ensures real-time data synchronization across sales, inventory, finance, and customer engagement platforms.

### Performance Optimization & Security

Iseyon optimizes [Shopify](https://www.shopify.com/) stores for speed, SEO, and reliability while implementing best-in-class security practices. Iseyon delivers fast load times, stable operations, and secure transactions to enhance customer trust and retention.

### Migration & Store Modernization

Iseyon assists businesses in migrating from legacy platforms to [Shopify](https://www.shopify.com/) with minimal downtime and zero data loss. Iseyon's migration services include product data, customer records, order history, and payment configurations.

### Ongoing Support & Maintenance

Iseyon provides continuous monitoring, enhancements, and support to keep [Shopify](https://www.shopify.com/) stores up to date, secure, and aligned with evolving business needs.

By partnering with Iseyon, businesses can launch, optimize, and scale their Shopify stores with confidence - turning online commerce into a powerful growth engine.

### eCommerce Store KPI Benchmarks: Industry Average vs. Iseyon-Optimized

Performance benchmarks across Iseyon Shopify client engagements and published eCommerce research (2024):

| KPI | Industry Average | Iseyon-Optimized | Lift | Source |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Page Load Time | 3.5s average | Under 1.8s | -49% load time | Google Core Web Vitals, 2024 |
| Mobile Conversion Rate | 1.8% | 2.9%+ | +61% increase | Shopify Commerce Report, 2024 |
| Checkout Abandonment Rate | 75% | Under 60% | -15pp reduction | Baymard Institute, 2024 |
| Store Uptime SLA | 99.5% | 99.9%+ | Under 4.4 hrs downtime/yr | Iseyon SLA benchmarks, 2024 |
| Annual GMV Growth | Market baseline | +20-35% | Business-specific gain | Shopify Partner results, 2024 |

*KPIs based on Iseyon client store audits and published eCommerce research; results vary by store size and category.*
homePageDescription: Iseyon builds scalable Shopify experiences with integrated analytics and optimization. We help brands grow faster through data-driven eCommerce solutions.

faqs.question: What Shopify services does Iseyon provide?
faqs.answer: In short, Iseyon delivers end-to-end consulting and development services for Shopify, including store design, custom theme development, app development, payment gateway integration, marketplace solutions, automation, migration, and ongoing support. We help startups, growing brands, and enterprise merchants build scalable, high-performance online stores.

faqs.question: Can Iseyon build custom Shopify apps and multi-vendor marketplaces?
faqs.answer: Yes, Iseyon develops custom Shopify apps to extend store functionality, automate workflows, and integrate third-party systems. We also build multi-vendor and marketplace solutions with features such as vendor onboarding, commission management, product ownership mapping, order tracking, and automated payouts-while maintaining centralized administrative control.

faqs.question: What payment gateways and checkout solutions does Iseyon support?
faqs.answer:
Iseyon integrates secure payment gateways including:
Razorpay
Stripe
PayPal
We implement advanced checkout logic such as split payments, multi-vendor settlements, and region-specific compliance to ensure seamless and secure transaction experiences.

faqs.question: How does Iseyon optimize Shopify performance and integrations?
faqs.answer: Iseyon optimizes Shopify stores for speed, SEO, reliability, and security. We integrate Shopify with ERP systems, CRM platforms, and analytics tools to enable real-time synchronization of sales, inventory, finance, and customer data. Our automation solutions streamline order processing, refunds, cancellations, and vendor settlements to improve operational efficiency.

faqs.question: Does Iseyon support Shopify migration and ongoing maintenance?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Iseyon manages seamless migrations from legacy eCommerce platforms to Shopify, ensuring secure transfer of product data, customer records, order history, and payment configurations with minimal downtime. We also provide continuous monitoring, enhancements, and technical support to keep your store secure, optimized, and aligned with business growth objectives.
